descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup playoff game; Phillips scores three goals.
descriptionLong: In a Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game on Tuesday night in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, the Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3. Jason Phillips scored three goals in the victory. The result tied the best-of-seven playoff series.
